name: claudex
description: 7 harness commands for Claude Code and Codex: /harness (6-agent build pipeline with Diagnostician), /harness-docs (5-agent documentation), /harness-review (5-agent code review + git), /harness-team (parallel multi-worker build with worktree isolation), /harness-qa (functional QA with Playwright, 8 test modes), /design (3-dial frontend design), /claude-dashboard (statusline). 23 specialized agent prompts with Managed Agents-inspired session protocol, execution audit trails, smart model routing, and background diagnostician.
